decision: Install schema, policy, validator, fixtures, invariant, receipt, handoff, tracker preview, and support/proof bundle; do not export the full OS in this stage.
synthesis: Approval must be explicit, scoped, expiring, authority-bound, and artifact-root-bound; otherwise it cannot safely unlock broad repair/export/pointer promotion.
The gate must run before side effects but must not replace post-tool validation; both are required.
Durable receipts/handoffs are required so an interrupted turn can be resumed without relying on chat memory.
